privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetic patient data created at runtime. Patient Alice Vance (DOB: 1980-05-15) is inserted into the NOSH database at task setup, along with a pending Cardiology Consult referral order dated 2 weeks prior. The task requires updating this order's status to one of: complete, completed, received, closed, or done. All metadata claims regarding patient demographics, order description, and initial status are accurate and match the actual database insertion statements in setup_task.sh.
